meaning: n.斯大林主义者adj.斯大林的,斯大林主义的
examples: The best of them were built during the Stalinist era and feature chandeliers, marble moldings and elaborate murals.
Marked by the triple whammy of the Great Depression, Nazi annexation, and brutal Stalinist occupation, the 20th century was not kind to the Czech people.
But, unless he is prepared to see the country go bust and slide back towards the dismal standards of the era of Enver Hoxha, his Stalinist predecessor, Mr Berisha has no choice.
